creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 214718
Proposed patch (since 516924 revision)

Patch to update print/ft2demos port from 2.10.0 to 2.10.2 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/freetype/freetype2-demos.git/tree/ChangeLog?h=VER-2-10-2

- Change filename extension of distfile from tar.bz2 to tar.xz, as described in changelog
https://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/freetype/freetype2-demos.git/tree/ChangeLog?h=VER-2-10-2#n391
